tasks.title: Final P0 visual target manifest
tasks.summary: Create the final P0 UI-01 through UI-12 target manifest and required evidence paths.
tasks.doneWhen: Final P0 target manifest lists UI-01..UI-12 only and excludes legacy unlock/payment/invite targets.

tasks.title: Mood and create flow runtime evidence
tasks.summary: Generate actual PNG, diff PNG, and metrics JSON for UI-01 through UI-05.
verificationCommands: final P0 visual capture for UI-01..UI-05
tasks.doneWhen: UI-01 through UI-05 have actual PNG, diff PNG, metrics JSON, no missing core text/control, and diffRatio <= 0.005.

tasks.title: Result activation runtime evidence
tasks.summary: Generate actual PNG, diff PNG, and metrics JSON for UI-06 through UI-08.
verificationCommands: final P0 visual capture for UI-06..UI-08
tasks.doneWhen: UI-06 through UI-08 have actual PNG, diff PNG, metrics JSON, no missing core text/control, and diffRatio <= 0.005.

tasks.title: Share save error runtime evidence
tasks.summary: Generate actual PNG, diff PNG, and metrics JSON for UI-09 through UI-12.
verificationCommands: final P0 visual capture for UI-09..UI-12
tasks.doneWhen: UI-09 through UI-12 have actual PNG, diff PNG, metrics JSON, no missing core text/control, and diffRatio <= 0.005.

tasks.title: Final P0 UI one-to-one gate
tasks.summary: Aggregate final P0 UI-01 through UI-12 evidence and update the delivery report with an honest verdict.
tasks.doneWhen: Final report, T33 result JSON, and T33 HANDOFF agree; pure PASS only if all 12 final P0 visual and regression evidence sets are complete.
